description: Structured loop: support captures field signal, engineering specs fix, verification closes loop. Bridge role connects backend support to product.

examples.context: Support saw thermal fail pattern. Engineering backlog ignored it.
Fix shipped for storage controller. Returns continued.
examples.resolution: Retest found incomplete firmware. Second fix verified.

examples.context: Shadow expert held tribal knowledge. No engineering taxonomy.
examples.resolution: Paired mf-tpl-059 mining with bridge log. KB article shipped.
